name: From the Ashes
notes: This meeting deals with the 12 steps and the 12 traditions of Alcoholics Anonymous. AA's 12 steps are a group of principles, spiritual in their nature, which, which, if practices as a way of life, can expel the obsession to drink and enable the sufferer to become happily and usefully whole. AA's 12 traditions outline the means by which AA maintains its unity and relates itself to the world about it, the way it lives and grows.
